Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LEM WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is granted, with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
